purpose: AIOS competitor/reference watchlist. When the user asks to update competitor content, sync these project snapshots before analyzing impact.
reporting_preference: When asked for the competitor list, answer in a Markdown table.

projects.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
projects.essence: Agent-native context database using a filesystem paradigm for memory, resources, and skills with hierarchical retrieval and session self-iteration.
projects.aios_relevance: Directly maps to AIOS ContextDB and can improve context hierarchy, retrieval observability, and self-evolving memory.
adoption_ideas: Add viking://-like logical context URIs to ContextDB exports.
Record retrieval path/trajectory for context packs.
Split memories/resources/skills into L0/L1/L2 token budgets.

projects.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
projects.essence: Personal always-on AI assistant/gateway with channels, daemon onboarding, plugins, pairing, skills, and cross-platform user surfaces.
projects.aios_relevance: Useful as a reference for daemonized gateway, onboarding, plugin boundaries, and multi-channel future; less direct for current coding-agent core.
adoption_ideas: Borrow onboarding and daemon health UX.
Study plugin SDK seam rules and channel pairing safety.
Track canvas/mobile patterns only if AIOS expands beyond CLI/browser workflows.

projects.description: omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode
projects.essence: Batteries-included OpenCode/OpenAgent harness with model-category routing, discipline agents, parallel background agents, LSP/AST tools, tmux, and hash-anchored edits.
projects.aios_relevance: High-value execution ideas for AIOS team runtime: model routing, stronger edit verification, LSP/AST tools, and long-running continuation loops.
adoption_ideas: Add model category routing to orchestrator blueprints.
Prototype hash-anchored edit validation for AIOS worker patches.
Make skill-scoped MCP startup on-demand instead of global context bloat.

projects.description: "OpenHarness: Open Agent Harness with a Built-in Personal Agent--Ohmo!"
projects.essence: Python open agent harness/Claude Code-style runtime with tool registry, permissions, hooks, MCP, background tasks, auto-compaction, team coordination, and dry-run preview.
projects.aios_relevance: Direct reference for making AIOS a complete harness rather than only wrappers: dry-run, permissions, hooks, task lifecycle, and TUI diagnostics.
adoption_ideas: Add AIOS dry-run readiness verdict for team/orchestrate/browser flows.
Unify tool permissions and hook events around every executor action.
Expose background task status and resume in the TUI/CLI.

projects.resolution: Resolved by GitHub search: exact repository name with AI/browser visual testing description.
projects.description: AI-powered visual testing for Chrome extensions, WordPress plugins, and web apps. Write YAML, capture screenshots, let AI diagnose.
projects.essence: MCP + CLI visual test harness using YAML flows, Playwright screenshots, screenshot diffing, privacy overlays, and optional AI visual diagnosis.
projects.aios_relevance: Very useful for AIOS browser automation verification, especially UI smoke tests and screenshot-based evidence after browser-flow changes.
adoption_ideas: Add a browser-flow YAML smoke format for AIOS.
Generate HTML evidence reports under temp/.
Add privacy overlay for screenshots before sharing or publishing.

projects.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
projects.essence: Meta-skill that turns a domain description into a generated agent team, skills, and orchestrator using reusable team architecture patterns.
projects.aios_relevance: Strong reference for improving AIOS orchestrator blueprints and automatically generating project-specific agent/team specs.
adoption_ideas: Convert memory/specs/orchestrator-blueprints.json into pattern-aware templates.
Add harness:evolve-style retrospective capture after team runs.
Generate project-local skills/agents from a domain brief.

projects.resolution: Resolved by GitHub search: exact repository name, cross-platform AI coding agent harness description.
projects.description: Cross-platform harnessing framework for AI coding agents. One lh CLI, profile-based dotfile deploys, async compound-loop memory, and a strict TDD discipline.
projects.essence: Cross-platform harness wrapper for AI coding agents with profiles, hooks, SQLite monitoring, knowledge directory, scheduler, migration, rollback, and strict TDD workflow.
projects.aios_relevance: Directly overlaps with AIOS wrappers, ContextDB, doctor/status, scheduler, and migration safety; high practical improvement value.
adoption_ideas: Add profile-aware AIOS installs and dotfile deploys.
Add SQLite-backed status views for sessions/tool use/cost.
Add migration dry-run + backup + rollback gates for installer changes.

projects.resolution: Exact owner/repo from user input; AIOS already uses this system.
projects.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
projects.essence: Composable agent skill methodology for brainstorming, planning, TDD, subagent-driven development, review, and verification-before-completion.
projects.aios_relevance: Already integrated; continue syncing upstream and adapt updates into AIOS-native skills and docs.
adoption_ideas: Periodically diff upstream skills against AIOS copies.
Keep AGENTS.md route aligned with latest superpowers semantics.
Map new cross-client plugin support into AIOS installers.

projects.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration platform for automation, workflows, and developer tools. Golutra transforms Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw into a unified agent system with parallel execution, task orchestration, long-running workflows, and AI productivity workspace.
projects.essence: Tauri desktop multi-agent workspace/control plane that keeps existing CLIs and adds visual orchestration, parallel execution, workflow templates, and terminal prompt injection.
projects.aios_relevance: Very similar product direction at the UX/control-plane layer; AIOS is more local-first CLI/runtime/memory/browser, Golutra is more visual desktop workspace.
adoption_ideas: Study visual session dashboard and terminal injection UX.
Expose AIOS team runs as import/export workflow templates.
Consider a thin desktop/front-end layer over AIOS CLI instead of replacing existing clients.

projects.description: RavenPair is an event‑driven orchestration platform that dispatches paired AI agents—Huginn (the thinker) and Muninn (the rememberer)—to execute complex, long‑running tasks. Inspired by Odin’s two ravens, our platform ensures that every workflow is both intelligent and context‑aware, delivering results that improve over time.
projects.essence: Self-hosted Go server for paired long-running agents with REST/WebSocket APIs, pgvector memory, NATS/Redis, LiteLLM, and plugin-only capabilities.
projects.aios_relevance: Useful if AIOS grows into a self-hosted server/control plane; less immediate for current local-first script and CLI runtime.
adoption_ideas: Borrow task/run/event schema concepts for AIOS telemetry.
Study plugin-only capability isolation.
Consider WebSocket/SSE progress if adding a dashboard service.

projects.resolution: Resolved by GitHub search: exact repository name. Related alternatives include code-yeongyu/openclaw-memory-auto-recall and speedyfoxai/openclaw-true-recall-base.
projects.description: Persistent memory, context compression & profile visibility for 🦞OpenClaw🦞.
projects.essence: OpenClaw memory plugin with persistent memory types, layered compression, hybrid retrieval, RRF/MMR diversification, guardrails, and inspection CLI/dashboard.
projects.aios_relevance: Directly useful for ContextDB recall quality, prompt budgets, explainability, and memory hygiene.
adoption_ideas: Add memory type taxonomy to ContextDB.
Add retrieval gate to skip irrelevant memory loads.
Add explain/status commands for why a memory was recalled.

projects.resolution: Resolved by GitHub search: exact repository name with multi-agent PLANS.md workflow description.
projects.description: A multi-agent workflow for long-running coding tasks, built around PLANS.md, persona skills, /plan, and subagents.
projects.essence: Persona-split ExecPlan workflow: planner creates/updates living plan, generator implements and maintains it, evaluator independently reviews against the plan.
projects.aios_relevance: Excellent lightweight upgrade for AIOS docs/plans and long-running handoff discipline.
adoption_ideas: Split AIOS plan handling into planner/generator/evaluator modes.
Add active/completed plan folders and required living sections.
Require independent evaluator checkpoint before cap/release.

projects.resolution: Resolved by relevance search: OpenClaw skill for multi-phase Codex/Claude Code workflows; exact-name search also found unrelated app examples.
projects.description: OpenClaw skill for orchestrating multi-phase coding agent workflows (Codex, Claude Code). TODO.md task queue + cron orchestrator + worker rules.
projects.essence: OpenClaw skill for autonomous sequential task queues using TODO.md, cron orchestration, cold-start workers, intermediate commits, and multi-signal stall detection.
projects.aios_relevance: Directly improves AIOS long-running harness resilience and stop/retry rules.
adoption_ideas: Add multi-signal stall detection to AIOS long-running harness.
Use cold-start worker per task to avoid context bloat.
Add .pause file and intermediate checkpoint/commit cadence to task queues.
